name: follow-up-and-close-the-sale
description: Jeff Shore's Follow Up and Close the Sale — a sales methodology toolkit focused on follow-up as the most underrated sales skill: buyer psychology, the first follow-up rule, value-driven contact, follow-up cadence, and closing the sale.
useCase: Master the art of sales follow-up — learn when to follow up, what to say, how to provide value, and how to close without pressure.
knownRisks: Some of Shore's specific cadence recommendations may not suit all industries or products
The 'value-first' principle is sound but requires effort to implement consistently
Persistence can cross into harassment if not done with genuine value
